title: GPS Mode Visibility Fix — Customer Booking Form

requirements.text: In RideRequestForm.tsx, conditionally render the Pickup Pincode and Pickup Area fields based on locationMode state: when locationMode === 'gps', hide both fields completely (do not render them); when locationMode === 'manual', show both fields and keep them required.

quotes: If locationMode === 'gps': Hide Pickup Pincode and Pickup Area fields completely.
When locationMode === 'gps', hide manual pickup fields. When locationMode === 'manual', show manual pickup fields.

acceptanceCriteria: Selecting 'Use GPS' (locationMode === 'gps') causes Pickup Pincode and Pickup Area fields to disappear from the DOM or be hidden via conditional rendering.
Selecting 'Manual' (locationMode === 'manual') causes Pickup Pincode and Pickup Area fields to be visible and marked as required.
No other fields are affected by this change.

requirements.text: In RideRequestForm.tsx, when the browser's GPS permission is denied (the existing geolocation error callback fires), automatically set locationMode back to 'manual', re-show the Pickup Pincode and Pickup Area fields, and display the inline error message: 'Location permission denied. Please enter pickup manually.' Do NOT modify the existing navigator.geolocation logic itself.

quotes: When GPS permission is denied: Automatically set locationMode back to 'manual'. Display error message: 'Location permission denied. Please enter pickup manually.' Re-show manual fields and make them required again.
If GPS permission is denied, switch locationMode back to 'manual' and re-show fields.

acceptanceCriteria: When the browser denies geolocation permission, locationMode is set to 'manual' automatically.
After permission denial, Pickup Pincode and Pickup Area fields reappear and are required.
The error message 'Location permission denied. Please enter pickup manually.' is displayed near the pickup section.
The existing navigator.geolocation call is not removed or restructured.

constraints: Do NOT modify drop location logic.
Do NOT modify the driver dashboard.
Do NOT modify the admin dashboard.
Do NOT modify trip filtering logic.
Do NOT modify pricing or payment logic.
Do NOT rebuild or restructure the existing navigator.geolocation GPS logic.
All changes must be scoped to RideRequestForm.tsx only.
nonGoals: Changes to any dashboard outside the Customer Booking Form.
Adding new GPS features beyond what already exists.
